meaning: v.将鼻插入,用鼻掘,用鼻爱抚
examples: I just want to feel the warm sunshine and run, and play and nuzzle with my family.
But I've been sent videos where cats nuzzle up to the speaker or even curl completely round it.
I tell the family good - bye in the only way I know how, a soft wag of my tail and a nuzzle of my nose.
They nuzzle and lean into humans they like, which can sometimes be disconcerting but is also touching.
After a day negotiating deals, nuzzle up to the lobby's modern fireplace with a vintage wine or hand-rolled cigar from ONYX bar.
